docs.title: Trekker — Project Design Doc
docs.content:
# Trekker — Project Design Doc

_Living document. Last updated: 2026-03-23. Edit freely._

---

## 1. Vision

Trekker is an Airbnb scraper bot that automatically collects property listings, pricing, and metadata for specific zip codes — helping Karthik find and track rental properties in target markets (starting with Hawaii).

**Goal:** Build a reliable, on-demand Airbnb intelligence pipeline that feeds structured data into Google Sheets for analysis and decision-making.

---

## 2. Current Architecture

```
Karthik (manual request)
    |
    v
OpenClaw Agent
    |
    v
Trekker CLI (Node.js)
    |--- Puppeteer + Stealth Plugin --> Airbnb.com
    |--- gog CLI --> Google Sheets
    |--- Discord API --> #trekker + #trekker-logs
```

### Tech Stack
- **Runtime:** Node.js (ES modules)
- **Scraping:** puppeteer-extra + stealth plugin
- **Sheets:** gog CLI (Google Workspace CLI)
- **Notifications:** Discord Bot API (direct fetch)
- **Orchestration:** OpenClaw (manual trigger, no cron)

### File Structure
```
trekker/
├── config.json          <- Sheet IDs, Discord channels, scraper settings
├── package.json
├── src/
│   ├── index.js         <- CLI entry point & command routing
│   ├── scraper.js       <- Puppeteer scraping (search + detail pages)
│   ├── sheets.js        <- Google Sheets read/write via gog CLI
│   ├── discord.js       <- Discord notifications
│   └── utils.js         <- Helpers, retry, price parsing
└── scripts/
    ├── scrape-zip.sh
    ├── refresh-listings.sh
    └── setup.sh
```

---

## 3. Data Model

### Google Sheets

#### Sheet 1: Zip Code Listings
- **ID:** `1rzTbeY0-5RviG692axrvRxnmW3Wy-K05RpYSXIR3GTc`
- **Tab: Zip Codes** — Which zip codes to scrape
  - Columns: Zip Code | Location | Status | Last Scraped | Notes
  - Currently tracking: 96761 (Lahaina, HI)
- **Tab: Listings** — Raw scraped data
  - 17 columns: Listing ID, URL, Title, Type, Location, Bedrooms, Bathrooms, Beds, Guests, Rating, Reviews, Host, Superhost, Original Price, Discounted Price, Total Price, Scraped At

#### Sheet 2: Preferred Listings
- **ID:** `1kyxVDVkCWHSuBaS4PmQf30dZvCnSiY9TNHVA662-XM4`
- **Tab: Listings** — Curated listings Karthik wants to track closely
  - Same 17 columns as above + Added At
- **Tab: Metadata** — Extended details for preferred listings
  - 12 columns: Listing ID, URL, Amenities, Description, House Rules, Check-in Time, Check-out Time, Cancellation Policy, Photos Count, Neighborhood, Distance to Beach, Notes

---

## 4. Current Workflow

```
1. Karthik says: "scrape 96761"
2. Agent runs: node src/index.js scrape-zip --location "96761"
3. Trekker:
   a. Launches headless Chrome with stealth
   b. Navigates to Airbnb search for zip code
   c. Scrapes all listing cards from search results (paginated)
   d. If <= 50 listings, visits each detail page for richer data
   e. Writes all data to Google Sheet (Listings tab)
   f. Posts progress to #trekker-logs, summary to #trekker
4. Karthik reviews sheet, moves favorites to Preferred Listings
```

---

## 5. What Works

- [x] Search page scraping (paginated)
- [x] Detail page scraping (beds, baths, rating, pricing, host, superhost)
- [x] Dual pricing capture (original strikethrough + discounted)
- [x] Google Sheets write via gog CLI
- [x] Discord progress notifications
- [x] Stealth plugin to avoid detection
- [x] Configurable delays between requests
- [x] Retry logic for failed navigations

---

## 6. Known Issues & Gaps

- [ ] **No zip code tab integration** — scraper doesn't read from Zip Codes tab yet, just takes --location arg
- [ ] **No deduplication** — re-scraping same zip appends duplicates
- [ ] **No preferred listing workflow** — no automated way to move listings to Preferred sheet
- [ ] **Config structure mismatch** — config.json was updated to nested zipCodeSheet/preferredSheet but sheets.js still reads old flat structure
- [ ] **CAPTCHA blocking** — no fallback when Airbnb blocks (just stops)
- [ ] **No date-aware pricing** — doesn't track price changes over time
- [ ] **Detail scraping is slow** — visits each listing page sequentially
- [ ] **No filtering** — scrapes everything, no min/max price or bedroom filters
- [ ] **Selectors may break** — Airbnb changes their DOM frequently

---

## 7. Open Questions (for Karthik to answer)

1. **What's the primary use case?** Investment research? Vacation planning? Competitive analysis?
2. **How often do you want to scrape?** Daily? Weekly? Only when you ask?
3. **Should Trekker auto-read zip codes from the sheet?** Or always pass --location manually?
4. **Do you want price tracking over time?** (Add a History tab with date + price snapshots)
5. **What filters matter?** Min/max price? Bedrooms? Superhost only? Rating threshold?
6. **How should Preferred Listings work?** Manual copy-paste? Or a command like `node src/index.js save --listing-id 12345`?
7. **Should scraping be parallelized?** (Multiple browser tabs for speed, higher detection risk)
8. **Do you want alerts?** e.g., "New listing under $150/night in 96761" pushed to Discord/Telegram
9. **Additional zip codes coming soon?** Or just 96761 for now?
10. **Any other Airbnb data you want?** Calendar availability? Booking history? Revenue estimates?

---

## 8. Potential Improvements

### Short-term
- Fix config.json / sheets.js mismatch
- Add `scrape-all` command that reads zip codes from the sheet
- Add deduplication (skip if listing ID already in sheet)
- Add basic filters (--min-price, --max-price, --min-bedrooms)

### Medium-term
- Price history tracking (new tab, append date + price snapshots)
- `save` command to move a listing to Preferred sheet with metadata
- Smarter retry/proxy rotation for CAPTCHA avoidance
- Parallel detail scraping (2-3 tabs)

### Long-term
- Automated alerts for new listings matching criteria
- Revenue estimation integration (AirDNA-style)
- Calendar availability tracking
- Dashboard view in Mission Control showing key metrics

---

## 9. Config Reference

```json
{
  "google": {
    "account": "hawaiiaiscrapper@gmail.com",
    "zipCodeSheet": {
      "sheetId": "1rzTbeY0-5RviG692axrvRxnmW3Wy-K05RpYSXIR3GTc",
      "listingsTab": "Listings",
      "zipCodesTab": "Zip Codes"
    },
    "preferredSheet": {
      "sheetId": "1kyxVDVkCWHSuBaS4PmQf30dZvCnSiY9TNHVA662-XM4",
      "listingsTab": "Listings",
      "metadataTab": "Metadata"
    }
  },
  "discord": {
    "trekkerChannel": "1485487716387917857",
    "logsChannel": "1485488259373989969",
    "guildId": "1483710344298893347"
  },
  "scraper": {
    "headless": true,
    "delayMin": 2000,
    "delayMax": 5000,
    "maxPages": 10,
    "timeout": 30000
  }
}
```

---

## 10. Links

- **Zip Code Listings:** https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1rzTbeY0-5RviG692axrvRxnmW3Wy-K05RpYSXIR3GTc
- **Preferred Listings:** https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1kyxVDVkCWHSuBaS4PmQf30dZvCnSiY9TNHVA662-XM4
- **Mission Control:** https://hawaiiaiscrapper-ops.github.io/mission-control-tasks/
- **Code:** ~/.openclaw/workspace/trekker/
- **Discord:** #trekker, #trekker-logs

---

_Edit this doc in Mission Control (Docs tab) or directly in `data/docs.json`. Your changes sync to GitHub automatically._

docs.title: Instructions Log
docs.content:
# Instructions Log — All Directives from Karthik

_This file tracks every instruction/request Karthik has given, in chronological order._

---

## 2026-03-23

### Session 1 (05:55 - 12:16 CDT)

| # | Time | Instruction | Status |
|---|------|-------------|--------|
| 1 | 05:56 | No cron schedules for Trekker - scrape only on manual request | Done |
| 2 | 06:14 | Continue working on trekker bot and add it to Mission Control | Done |
| 3 | 06:57 | Swap to opus 4-6 | Done |
| 4 | 11:59 | Add zip codes to track in Google Sheet, start with 96761 only | Done |
| 5 | 12:04 | Rename sheet to 'Zip Code Listings', create 'Preferred Listings' sheet with Listings + Metadata tabs | Done |
| 6 | 12:08 | Make sure you don't forget this use case | Done |
| 7 | 12:09 | Log every input from Karthik | Done |
| 8 | 12:11 | Document all instructions for reference | Done |
| 9 | 12:13 | Add instructions log to Mission Control for editing | Done |
| 10 | 12:16 | Create a project design doc for Trekker in Mission Control | Done |

---

## Standing Instructions

- **No cron schedules for Trekker** - scrape only on manual request
- **Log every instruction** from Karthik
- **Track zip codes from Google Sheet** - only scrape what's in the Zip Codes tab
- **No name** - don't suggest names, don't ask for one
- **No onboarding** - skip all intro/setup conversations
- **Direct communication** - no fluff

docs.title: Trekker - Airbnb Scraper Reference
docs.content:
# Trekker - Airbnb Scraper Bot

## Overview
Scrapes Airbnb listings by zip code, dumps data to Google Sheets, posts progress to Discord.

## Google Sheets

### 1. Zip Code Listings
- **ID:** 1rzTbeY0-5RviG692axrvRxnmW3Wy-K05RpYSXIR3GTc
- **Tab: Listings** - Scraped listing data
- **Tab: Zip Codes** - Zip codes to track (currently: 96761 Lahaina, HI)

### 2. Preferred Listings
- **ID:** 1kyxVDVkCWHSuBaS4PmQf30dZvCnSiY9TNHVA662-XM4
- **Tab: Listings** - Curated/saved listings
- **Tab: Metadata** - Amenities, rules, neighborhood details

## Commands

```bash
# Scrape by location
cd ~/.openclaw/workspace/trekker
node src/index.js scrape-zip --location "96761" --checkin "2026-04-01" --checkout "2026-04-07"

# Refresh existing listings
node src/index.js refresh --sheet-id "1rzTbeY0-5RviG692axrvRxnmW3Wy-K05RpYSXIR3GTc"
```

## Config
- Google account: hawaiiaiscrapper@gmail.com
- Discord: #trekker (summaries), #trekker-logs (progress)
- No cron schedules - manual only

## Workflow
1. Trekker reads zip codes from 'Zip Codes' tab
2. Scrapes Airbnb for those locations
3. Results go to 'Listings' tab
4. Karthik moves preferred listings to Preferred Listings sheet

docs.title: Mission Control Setup
docs.content:
# Mission Control Setup

## URLs
- **Dashboard:** https://hawaiiaiscrapper-ops.github.io/mission-control-tasks/
- **Repo:** github.com/hawaiiaiscrapper-ops/mission-control-tasks

## Settings
- GitHub Owner: hawaiiaiscrapper-ops
- GitHub Repo: mission-control-tasks
- GitHub Branch: main
- Gateway: http://localhost:18789 (loopback only, won't work from GitHub Pages)

## Data Files
- `data/tasks.json` - Tasks + projects + activities
- `data/projects.json` - Project list with progress
- `data/crons.json` - Cron job definitions
- `data/docs.json` - Documentation (this!)
- `data/version.json` - Cache-busting version
- `data/journal.md` - Daily journal entries

## Webhook
- Hook path: /hooks/github
- Transform: github-mission-control.mjs
- Session: hook:mission-control

## Known Issues
- Gateway URL won't connect from GitHub Pages (CORS) - Team view won't load
- Cache-busting auto-reloads every 2 min via version.json check
